name: Roxanne "Rosie" Richmond | "Huh? Oh... Well, I'm here at least!"

Name: Roxanne "Rosie" Richmond

Nicknames: Rosie, Rose, Air-head

Gender: Female

Pronouns: She/Her

Species: Anthropomorphic Red Wolf

Age: 20

Height: 6'5", taller than most

Weight: 290lbs, has some heft to her

Eyes: Red, wide open, never still, friendly, incredibly expressive

Hair: Crimson, long, neat, clean.

Description: Rosie appears as a tall, voluptuous anthropomorphic Red Wolf. She stands fairly tall, at 6'5", making her taller than most. She weighs about 290lbs, of which is mostly because of the size and sheer weight of her breasts and thighs. She has a coat of red fur, her fur isn't very vibrant, but isn't crimson. It's somewhere in between. She has long red hair that's darker than her fur, as well as an incredibly fluffy neck. Her fur coat is usually always warm, because it traps her body heat. Allowing her to stay warm and cozy all the time. Red Wolves are known for their long, thin but fluffy tails. Her tail in incredibly long, and can easily wrap around someone's torso twice. She wears so many different types of lipstick and nail polish, she pretty much changes their colors every week. This week: It's purple lipstick on her full, plump lips and purple nail polish in her long nails. She has incredibly large breasts, each one two times bigger than her own head. Round and perky and are incredibly squishy and weighty to the touch. Like two huge, fluffy pillows are attached to her chest. She has incredibly wide hips, and huge ample thighs and butt. She has a huge, perky bubble butt and inviting thighs. Her thighs are huge, pillowy and soft. Being perfect for cuddling. She has to wear circular glasses all the time due to bad eyesight.
